source_mapping_summary: plane_wave maps to Meep source metadata; broadband bands map to GaussianSource/broadband pulse preview terms.
monitor_mapping_summary: scattering_spectrum maps to Meep flux/DFT monitor metadata only.
native_monitor_terms: closed flux box / incident-flux normalization plan

preview_metadata.monitor_region: closed flux box or equivalent far-field proxy around nanoparticle

diagnostics: Meep preview generation can describe source and monitor intent.
warnings: Real flux, DFT field, scattering, or extinction results require a Meep run.
